Title: Relates to administrative law judges overseeing the process certain policy proceedings
Summary: Requires the department of public service to assign an administrative law judge to oversee the process in policy proceedings before the public service commission; provides that the department of public service shall be considered a party in policy proceedings.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to requiring an administrative law judge to oversee the process in policy proceedings before the public service commission
